mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_bgm_collection c
LEFT JOIN bangumi_subject s ON s.id = c.subject_id

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.subject_id, c.subject_type, c.bgm_interest_id, c.rate, c.type, c.comment, c.tags, c.ep_status, c.vol_status, c.is_private, c.bgm_updated_at, c.sync_time, c.create_time, s.name, s.name_cn, s.nsfw, s.score, s.score_details, s.`rank`, s.infobox, s.images FROM user_bgm_collection c LEFT JOIN bangumi_subject s ON s.id = c.subject_id
ORDER BY c.bgm_updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

select bgm_interest_id as id, rate, type, comment, tags, ep_status, vol_status, `private` as "privately", bgm_updated_at from user_bgm_collection where user_id = #{userId} and subject_id = #{subjectId}
